name: Lucid
description: Visual collaboration platform for diagrams and whiteboards.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Lucid account as an admin
2. Go to developer.lucid.co
3. Create an API key with AccountReadonly grant
4. Copy the API key and paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Create an API key in the Lucid Developer Portal at developer.lucid.co. Requires AccountReadonly grant.
